readings.summary: The Israelites complain to Moses in the desert.

readings.citation:
Ps 95:1-2, 6-7, 8-9. R. v.8
If today you hear his voice, harden not your hearts.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 95:1-2, 6-7, 8-9. R. v.8
If today you hear his voice, harden not your hearts.

readings.summary: Christ laid down his life for us.

Lord, you are truly the Savior of the world;
give me living water, that I may never thirst again.
Jesus meets the Samaritan woman at the well.

antiphons.text:
My eyes are always on the Lord,
for he rescues my feet from the snare.
Turn to me and have mercy on me,
for I am alone and poor.

antiphons.citation: Entrance Antiphon • Option II | Cf. Ez 36:23–26
antiphons.text:
When I prove my holiness among you,
I will gather you from all the foreign lands;
and I will pour clean water upon you
and cleanse you from all your impurities,
and I will give you a new spirit, says the Lord.

For anyone who drinks it, says the Lord,
the water I shall give will become in him
a spring welling up to eternal life.

gathering.title: Come to the Water
gathering.composer: John B. Foley, SJ • Arranged by Arielle Phan
